title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
